prompt: I have a plan for a React web app dashboard at augment-plan-workspace/test-plans/webapp-plan.md. Can you augment this plan? Save the augmented version.

assertions.text: Plan contains a scaffolding milestone that creates README.md, ARCHITECTURE.md, and AGENTS.md
Plan does NOT add structured JSON envelope or CLI-specific contract (since this is a web app, not a CLI)
Plan does NOT define ERR_ prefixed error codes or exit code ranges (no CLI)
Plan includes a step to create AGENTS.md with project guidance
Plan includes a step to set up CI workflow (e.g., .github/workflows/ci.yml)
Plan includes a step to configure linting and/or formatting tools
Progress section has been updated with new unchecked steps for scaffolding
